sections.paragraph:
Original: עדלּם

Transliteration: ‛ădûllâm

Phonetic: ad-ool-lawm'

BDB Definition:

Adullam = "justice of the people"
  1. a town of the Canaanites allotted to Judah and lying in the lowlands; site of the cave where David hid

Origin: probably from the pass. part. of the same as H5724

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
